title: Construction and Real Estate Development Consulting Services
excerpt: We provide value to our clients by providing a cost effective solution for their needs in a full range of construction and real estate development services.
contentHtml:
PH&C provides a full range of real estate development and owner’s representation consulting services. Our expertise includes site and facility analysis, project entitlement, feasibility budgeting, design management, pre-construction services, value engineering and construction management.

PH&C is devoted to building relationships with developers, landowners, engineers, architects, contractors, and government agencies to support their project goals. PH&C’s strong relationships with its clients, a majority of which are repeat customers, is a testament to our work and our service oriented attitude.

PH&C believes successful business partnerships begin with adding value by providing cost effective, extraordinary expertise in our field that allows and supports our clients completing their development goals.

CHECK OUT OUR COMPANY BROCHURE HERE

PH&C has been verified by CVE as a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Small Business (SDVOSB)
